metadata.name: MariaDB
metadata.description: Community-developed, open-source relational database management system and drop-in replacement for MySQL.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Community-developed, open-source relational database management system and drop-in replacement for MySQL.

## Deploy
- Render `compose.yaml` and `.env`, review the generated files, then start the stack with `docker compose up -d`.
- Confirm the container is healthy with `docker compose ps` and follow `docker compose logs -f` during the first boot if initialization is still running.

## Post-Install
- Store the rendered database credentials securely and test a root login and an application login before pointing workloads at the instance.

## Docs
- [MariaDB](https://mariadb.org/)
- [Documentation](https://mariadb.com/kb/en/documentation/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/MariaDB/server)

## Next Steps
Log in with your initial users:
```bash
Root password: << database_root_password >>
App user: << database_user >>
App password: << database_password >>
```

variables.name: database_password
variables.title: Database Password
variables.description: Password for the application database user.

variables.name: database_root_password
variables.title: Root Password
variables.description: Password for the MariaDB root user.
